_comment: Hand-edit this file to manage homepage testimonials. Empty 'reviews' array = section auto-hides. Replace placeholders with real customer reviews as they come in. Each entry needs quote, name, town, date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional: vehicle, rating (1-5), source ('Google'/'Facebook'/'direct').

reviews.quote: Broke down on the A1(M) at 11pm with the kids in the car. Big Ben was with us inside 35 minutes, friendly, calm, and got us home for £52. Couldn't ask for more.
reviews.name: [Customer Name]

reviews.quote: Used Big Ben's to collect a classic from BCA Bedlington. Photos at pickup, photos at drop, the car arrived spotless and on time. Will be using them every auction from now on.
reviews.name: [Trade Customer]

reviews.quote: Phone answered first ring at 2am, gave a price up-front, no hidden extras. Truck arrived in 40 minutes. Genuinely lovely man.
reviews.name: [Customer Name]

reviews.quote: MOT failure on a 19-year-old Focus. Got more for the scrap from Big Ben's than I would have driving it to the yard myself, and they came to me. Cash on the day.
reviews.name: [Customer Name]
